lineage.Process: CreateFishnet D:\外挂\code-all-other\gis小组项目\同济校园地图\newGewang1.shp "642045.896404337 3463096.5891" "642045.896404337 3463106.5891" 5 5 # # "643125.896404338 3464011.5891" LABELS "642045.896404337 3463096.5891 643125.896404338 3464011.5891 PROJCS["CGCS2000_3_Degree_GK_CM_120E",GEOGCS["GCS_China_Geodetic_Coordinate_System_2000",DATUM["D_China_2000",SPHEROID["CGCS2000",6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Gauss_Kruger"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",120.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",1.0],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]]" POLYGON
ExportFeatures newGewang1 D:\外挂\code-all-other\gis小组项目\同济校园地图\gewang\gezi_polygon.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Id "Id" true true false 6 Long 0 6,First,#,newGewang1,Id,-1,-1" #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.4.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\外挂\code-all-other\gis小组项目\同济校园地图\gewang</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>gezi_polygon.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>sun</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
Copy D:\外挂\code-all-other\gis小组项目\同济校园地图\gewang\gezi_polygon.shp D:\外挂\code-all-other\gis小组项目\GISGameFramework.WinFormHost\bin\Debug\同济校园地图\gezi_polygon.shp Shapefile #
Rename D:\外挂\code-all-other\gis小组项目\GISGameFramework.WinFormHost\bin\Debug\同济校园地图\gezi_polygon.shp D:\外挂\code-all-other\gis小组项目\GISGameFramework.WinFormHost\bin\Debug\同济校园地图\hillshade.shp ShapeFile

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.4.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\外挂\code-all-other\gis小组项目\GISGameFramework.WinFormHost\bin\Debug\同济校园地图</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>hillshade.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>AreaId</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>AreaName</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField hillshade AreaId !FID! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField hillshade AreaName "Name_"+str(!FID!) PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

itemLocation.linkage: file://\\CGL520\D$\外挂\code-all-other\gis小组项目\GISGameFramework.WinFormHost\bin\Debug\同济校园地图\gezi_polygon

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
